info.description: This is the core backend service for RevieU
info.title: RevieU Core API

get.description: Returns a list of merchants for admin management

patch.description: Updates a merchant's status or verification

get.description: Returns a list of user reports for admin review

post.description: Sends a user-written draft review (text and optional images) to Gemini and returns three polished candidates. The response contains text only; images are processed for context but never returned.
post.summary: Polish a draft review with AI

parameters.description: Draft review text (10-4000 chars after trim)
parameters.name: text

parameters.description: Image attachment (repeat for multiple, up to 6, 5 MiB each, jpeg/png/gif/webp)
parameters.name: images

parameters.description: Optional business category, e.g. restaurant, cafe
parameters.name: businessCategory

parameters.description: Optional output language hint, e.g. en, zh
parameters.name: language

get.description: Handles Google OAuth callback, creates/logs in user, redirects to frontend with token

post.description: Sends a password reset email if the account exists
Login with email and password to get JWT token

get.description: Redirects user to Google OAuth authorization page
Get the current authenticated user's information (protected route)

post.description: Rotates refresh token and returns a new access token pair
Register a new user with username, email and password

get.description: Verify user email using the token sent to their email
Returns a list of all categories
Returns conversations for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new conversation

get.description: Returns messages for a conversation

post.description: Sends a message in a conversation

patch.description: Updates settings for a conversation (e.g. mute)

post.description: Initiates payment flow for a coupon
Redeems a coupon for the authenticated user
Validates a coupon by ID

get.description: Returns the home feed items

post.description: Generates presigned URLs for uploading files directly to R2 storage
post.summary: Create presigned URLs for media upload

post.description: Creates a media upload and returns upload URLs
Triggers analysis for a media upload

delete.description: Placeholder endpoint for future merchant deletion flow

get.description: Returns stores owned by the authenticated merchant user

post.description: Creates a new store for the authenticated merchant

delete.description: Soft-deletes a merchant-owned store and its bound coupons

patch.description: Updates a store for the authenticated merchant

post.description: Marks a merchant-owned store as published
Creates a store-scoped coupon for an owned published store

delete.description: Soft-deletes a store-scoped coupon under an owned store

post.description: Marks a merchant-owned store as hidden

get.description: Returns the verification status for the authenticated merchant

post.description: Submits verification documents for the authenticated merchant
Redeems a scanned voucher for the authenticated merchant

get.description: Validates a scanned voucher for the authenticated merchant without mutating state
get.summary: Preview voucher redemption by scan token

post.description: Redeems a voucher for merchant-owned store operations

get.description: Returns merchants, optionally filtered by category
Returns a merchant by ID

post.description: Follow a merchant

get.description: Returns reviews for a merchant
Returns notifications for the authenticated user

post.description: Marks all notifications as read for the authenticated user

patch.description: Marks a single notification as read

get.description: Returns orders for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new order for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns an order by ID

post.description: Simulates payment success for an order and issues vouchers

get.description: Returns a list of available packages
Returns a package by ID

post.description: Creates a payment record

get.description: Returns a payment by ID

post.description: Creates a new review for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns a single review by ID

post.description: Adds a comment to a review
Likes a review for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns a list of stores
Returns a store by ID
Lists published active coupons under a store
Returns operating hours for a store
Returns reviews for a store

delete.description: Schedules account deletion (cooling period). Due deletions are executed asynchronously by a background worker.

post.description: Queues a user data export

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's saved addresses

post.description: Adds a new address for the authenticated user
Sets an address as default

get.description: Returns favorites for the authenticated user
Returns followers of the authenticated user
Returns merchants the authenticated user follows
Returns users the authenticated user follows
Returns likes for the authenticated user
Returns the authenticated user's notification settings

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's notification settings

get.description: Returns posts created by the authenticated user
Returns the authenticated user's privacy settings

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's privacy settings

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile

patch.description: Updates nickname, avatar, intro, or location

get.description: Returns reviews created by the authenticated user
Returns a user's public profile

post.description: Follow a user

get.description: Returns a user's posts
Returns a user's reviews
Returns vouchers for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a voucher for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns a voucher by code

post.description: Sends voucher share email
Sends voucher share SMS

get.description: Returns a voucher by ID

delete.description: Deletes a voucher owned by the authenticated user
